headline: Non-Discretionary Retail Stocks Q4 Highlights: Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR)
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) and the rest of the non-discretionary retail stocks fared in Q4.

headline: Dollar Tree CEO shares reassuring update on prices
summary: A lot of consumers today are feeling the crunch of inflation. On a broad level, the Consumer Price Index rose 2.4% annually in February. But certain key categories rose at an even faster pace. Food costs, for example, rose 3.1% on a whole, while energy services rose 6.3%. These persistent ...
